expertAssessments.rationale: Production UI query returned the exact backup host db-mysql-dc1-backup with DISK 70% and monitoring-metric-current evidence after the v8.12.48 AI Engine cleanup deployment.
GitLab release pipeline 2552542622 completed deploy, deploy_ai_engine, and both post-deploy smoke jobs successfully; Vercel and Cloud Run versions both report 8.12.48.
Playwright MCP exercised real browser route rendering, dashboard interaction, server detail tab switching, AI sidebar input/submit, and captured durable evidence.
Dashboard and AI response used the same OTel-backed 17:00 KST snapshot: db-mysql-dc1-backup DISK 70% appears in Top 5 and the AI answer.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after Vercel Playwright MCP QA; effective 17.2740 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: v8.12.48 AI sidebar backup disk answer

notes: No unexpected user-visible failure observed. The deliberate 404 smoke produced the expected browser 404 resource console entry.

Two /api/servers fetches showed net::ERR_ABORTED during rapid route transition to the server detail page; the server detail page loaded and tabs passed, so this was treated as non-blocking navigation cancellation.
